title: Marqeta (MQ) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript - First GAAP Profitability
text: Marqeta Q1 2026 Earnings Summary. Key Financial Metrics: Revenue & Profitability: Net Revenue: $160 million (19% YoY growth). Gross Profit: $118 million (19% YoY growth). Adjusted EBITDA: $33 million (66% growth), 20% margin. GAAP Net Income: $8 million with $0.02 diluted EPS—first quarterly GAAP profitability. Processing Volume: Total Processing Volume (TPV): $112 billion, up 33% YoY. Second consecutive quarter above $100 billion. Third straight quarter with growth exceeding 30%. Operating Efficiency: Adjusted Operating Expenses: $84 million (7% growth). Gross Profit Take Rate: 10.5 basis points (down 0.5 bps sequentially). Cash & Short-term Investments: $712 million. Business Highlights: Customer Concentration: Approximately 42% of net revenue comes from Block, declining two percentage points sequentially as non-Block revenue grows roughly twice as fast. Product Momentum: Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL): ~60% TPV growth. Expense Management: >40% growth. New offerings include credit builder cards and Mastercard One credentials. Geographic Expansion: Twelve of the top 15 customers operate in multiple countries, with six active in five or more nations. 2026 Guidance: Net Revenue Growth: 12%-14%. Gross Profit Growth: 10%-12%. Adjusted EBITDA Growth: Mid- to high-20s%. Full-Year GAAP Net Income: ~$15 million. Notable Developments: Management highlighted emerging opportunities in stablecoin-backed cards, agentic commerce, and large bank partnerships—with one major U.S. financial institution now live provisioning credit directly into consumer wallets.
